title: T-027 — Manual put-away service (P1) (WH §8.3)
prompt:
# T-027 — Manual put-away service (P1) (WH §8.3)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §8.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `manualPutaway`: post-GRN Operator workflow scan LP → suggest location (basic — default warehouse zone for product.category) → confirm to target location → stock_moves(move_type='putaway'). P1 manual only; put-away rules WH-E12 deferred to P2.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/manual-putaway.ts`: `suggestPutawayLocation({lp_id}): {suggested_location_id}` + `executePutaway({lp_id, target_location_id})`.
2. Suggestion: lookup product.category → warehouse_zones config (or fallback to grn_items.location_id from receipt).
3. Execute: writes stock_moves(move_type='putaway', from=receiving_zone, to=target), updates LP.location_id.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/putaway.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/putaway.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an LP at receiving zone, when `suggestPutawayLocation` is called, then it returns a non-null target location based on product category.
2. Given `executePutaway` is called with target, when complete, then LP.location_id=target and a stock_moves row with move_type='putaway' exists.
3. Given LP is not at receiving (already put away), when executePutaway called, then service rejects.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/manual-putaway.test.ts` asserting suggest + execute + already-putaway rejection.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test manual-putaway`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement put-away rules engine here (P2 WH-E12).
- Do not skip stock_moves emission.

## Dependencies
- T-025
